utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 of these sections. Check if each is fully specified with required details: - health_coverage: includes both physical and mental health insurance with costs (monthly and annual) and details; total health costs provided. Fully specified. - property_coverage: home/contents insurance with costs (monthly and annual) and details. Fully specified. - travel_coverage: travel insurance with costs (monthly and annual) and details. Fully specified. - additional_services: enhancement services with costs (noted as included at no additional charge) and details. Fully specified. - total_budget: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown is provided, including previous costs and savings. Fully specified. Therefore, all 5/5 items are included and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Map each provider in the final plan to the closest matching item name in the ground-truth. For health physical: 'LifeFirst Standard Physical Health' aligns with 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.physical_health. For mental health: 'LifeFirst Standard Mental Health' aligns with 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.mental_health. For property: 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage' matches exactly under property_protection.home_content. For travel: 'LifeFirst Standard Travel' aligns with 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.
